--The Most PRRRESTEGIOUS ANNUAL RACE ON EARTH!--

Welcome, To the 24 Hours Of Le Mans.
186 Drivers
One Winner.

The Circuit De La Sarthe, one of the longest semi-permenant circuits on this planet, also the host of the 24 Hours Of Le Mans. (24 Heures Du Mans)
Grueling circuit. we all know. and now. you get to be among the 186 drivers in this.
will you return as a winner?

or return next year with higher hopes?

Goodluck.
